body: review-spec cycle 1: REQUEST_CHANGES (1 HIGH split-audit, 2 MEDIUM field-order/version-pin, 2 LOW parse-hook/CHANGELOG-path). Addressed: AC-09 split into read-site + type-system axes naming Relation::FIELDS, drift-test at schema.rs:1245-1257, relation_kind_str match at verbs.rs:3849-3857; AC-05 (f) reframed as backward-compat key-absence not field-ordering; AC-10 enumeration dropped for dynamic bump + CHANGELOG path pinned to repo-root; AC-02 clarified parse-hook reality (parse_yaml is generic, custom Deserialize is the single-point fix). Re-fork cycle 2.

review-spec cycle 2: REQUEST_CHANGES (2 MEDIUM choice-id-form/Deserialize-trap, 1 LOW vacuous-parity-pin). Addressed: AC-07/08 switched to bare numeric choice id 'choice: 0020' per id-conventions.md (Choice.id is numeric-only by design); AC-02 pre-rec flipped from custom Deserialize (a) to call-site sweep (b) because custom Deserialize loses derive's deny_unknown_fields and ac-05(e) coverage; AC-06 pinned to card.show to prevent vacuous closure. Re-fork cycle 3.

Consumer audit (ac-09): 4 READ sites in verbs.rs (forward edges 3819+, reverse 3833+, mermaid 5650+, graphviz 5684+) all skip choice-target relations. 5 TYPE-SYSTEM sites (Relation struct + FIELDS + drift test + RelationKind + relation_kind_str). 7 PARSE sites wired with validate_relations() (index.rs, canonicalise.rs, verbs.rs:2837/3697/3797/3962/5751). 539 tests pass, orbit verify clean.

drive completed: Relation schema choice-target support shipped (additive Relation.choice + Card::validate_relations + RelationKind::Respects), edges written on cards 0005+0006, hygiene fix orbit-state/.orbit/.gitignore. 0.4.36. PR https://github.com/meridian-online/orbit/pull/34 stacked three-deep on #33→#32 — review APPROVE, merge=manual (guided autonomy).
